skills.name: market-brief
skills.summary: Default one-symbol brief combining current-state, action, and execution frames.

skills.name: market-data
skills.summary: Run the one-symbol data-pipeline stage for normalization, quality review, and export.

skills.name: market-analyze
skills.summary: Interpret current trend, regime, and risk state without action or sizing.

skills.name: decision-support
skills.summary: Produce conditional action and sizing guidance under explicit account assumptions.

skills.name: strategy-design
skills.summary: Translate an accepted view into a conditional execution plan, checklist, and monitoring frame.

skills.name: market-screen
skills.summary: Rank a candidate universe for breadth-first triage before deeper review.

skills.name: session-status
skills.summary: Inspect runtime context, recent workflow state, and artifact locations.

skills.name: feishu-notify
skills.summary: Send a fail-open outbound Feishu notification for workflow handoff or status delivery.

skills.name: decision-dashboard
skills.summary: Build a batch conditional-action dashboard over a watchlist or symbol set.

skills.name: watchlist-import
skills.summary: Run universe intake by normalizing raw watchlist text or files into resolved symbols.

skills.name: fundamental-context
skills.summary: Gather best-effort non-price context with explicit partial-status handling.

skills.name: market-recap
skills.summary: Render market-review and next-session recap blueprints, not live market payloads.

skills.name: analysis
skills.summary: Build a deeper one-symbol research memo with persisted artifacts.

skills.name: strategy-chat
skills.summary: Manage anchored multi-turn strategy discussion over an explicit symbol or prior artifact.

skills.name: news-intel
skills.summary: Rank caller-supplied headline evidence into catalyst, risk, and narrative blocks.

skills.name: stock-data
skills.summary: Assemble a reusable structured snapshot across market features and fail-open context.

skills.name: technical-scan
skills.summary: Provide a technical-only read anchored to existing market-analysis outputs.

skills.name: analysis-history
skills.summary: Browse and compare saved runs over time using persisted artifacts.

skills.name: backtest-evaluator
skills.summary: Score saved runs or deterministic simulations against later data with explicit assumptions.

skills.name: data-sync
skills.summary: Audit data freshness, source health, and next sync actions for the workflow.

skills.name: reports
skills.summary: Retrieve exact stored artifacts and metadata without rerunning analysis.

skills.name: paper-trading
skills.summary: Rehearse simulated execution with local ledger updates and A-share settlement rules.

skills.name: watchlist
skills.summary: Manage post-import universe grouping, review cadence, and tracking workflow.

skills.name: model-capability-advisor
skills.summary: Recommend heuristic model pairings for workflow design and agent execution depth.
